data.title: Bank Of America Beats Q1 Expectations, Analysts Boost Price Targets
data.description: Bank of America Corp (NYSE: BAC) posted positive first-quarter results, as per analysts. Piper Sandler's Scott Siefers reaffirmed a Neutral stance and upped the price target to $59 from $53. Gerard Cassidy from RBC Capital Markets retained an Outperform recommendation with a $59 target. Chris Mcgratty at Keefe, Bruyette & Woods also kept an Outperform rating, increasing the price target to $64 from $63. John McDonald at Truist Securities maintained a Buy rating, raising the price target from $57 to $61. Glenn Schorr of Evercore ISI Group maintained an Outperform rating and hiked the price target from $55 to $61. Bank of America's core results surpassed expectations, posting earnings of $1.11 per share, exceeding the consensus. For the full article, refer to Benzinga.com.

data.title: Crypto exchange announces $334M Bitcoin wallet inaccessible as former CEO disappeared with 4,500 BTC in 2022.
data.description: A Polish cryptocurrency exchange, Zonda, has revealed a Bitcoin wallet address containing $334 million. However, the exchange acknowledged that the private keys to access these funds were not transferred from the former CEO who went missing in 2022. This situation has left the exchange unable to access these significant funds.

data.title: Meitav Investment House (TASE: MTAV) Announces an Exchange Tender Offer to Acquire All Shares of Peninsula, a Subsidiary Operating in the Non-Bank Credit Segment
data.description: On April 16, 2026, Meitav Investment House (TASE: MTAV), based in Tel Aviv, Israel, announced a comprehensive exchange tender offer to purchase all outstanding shares of Peninsula, a subsidiary that is predominantly owned (around 80%) by Meitav Investment House. Peninsula is a company listed on the Tel Aviv Stock Exchange and is engaged in various operations.

data.title: Utexo and x402 Enable USDT Payments for the Agent Economy with Near-Instant Settlement
data.description: Today, on April 16, 2026, Utexo revealed a partnership with x402 to introduce USDT functionality to the x402 payment system. This collaboration aims to enable instant, peer-to-peer transactions with settlement capabilities. Utexo serves as the Bitcoin-based platform for executing and finalizing stablecoin transactions, enhancing the efficiency of the x402 protocol.

data.title: Healthcare Career Expo in St. Johns County Connects 160 Attendees with 40 Healthcare Employers
data.description: The first-ever Healthcare Career Expo was held in St. Johns County, Florida on April 16, 2026, signaling a significant step forward in promoting workforce development, economic growth, and community welfare. This event, organized by St. Johns County in collaboration with the local Chamber of Commerce, attracted a notable number of participants and attendees. By focusing on the healthcare sector, the expo aimed to highlight job opportunities and educational pathways in this crucial industry. It served as a platform to connect employers and job seekers, contributing to the county's overall prosperity. The successful event underscored the community's commitment to fostering economic advancement and enhancing the well-being of its residents.

data.title: Higginbotham Grows Alabama Presence, Joining Forces with Montgomery Powerhouse Harmon Dennis Bradshaw (HDB)
data.description: Higginbotham, an employee-owned insurance and financial services firm based in Texas, has partnered with Harmon Dennis. The move, announced on April 16, 2026, is geared towards achieving commercial scale and leveraging mutual strengths. This collaboration provides Higginbotham with a larger platform for growth.

data.title: Accuris Appoints Tom Genova as Head of Sales, Americas to Accelerate Growth and Expand Market Leadership
data.description: Accuris, a prominent company specializing in Engineering Intelligence, has appointed Tom Genova as the Head of Sales, Americas. With over 20 years of experience in enterprise sales leadership, Genova has excelled in scaling high-performance teams and fostering growth in industrial, engineering, and enterprise software sectors. This strategic move is crucial for Accuris as they broaden their horizons from standards access to a comprehensive offering.

data.title: Race Rock Introduces TxDOT-Approved One-Piece Sign Clamp for Triangular Slip Base Systems
data.description: Houston-based company Race Rock has introduced a TxDOT-approved one-piece sign clamp designed for triangular slip base sign support systems utilized in Texas Department of Transportation (TxDOT) highway projects. The clamp features a two-bolt clamping system and has been reviewed and approved by TxDOT for use in situations where contract specifications mandate the use of triangular slip base sign support systems. These systems are frequently employed in breakaway sign installations.

data.title: Stock Market Today: S&P 500 Holds Recent Gains; AMD Breaks Out; These Data Center Stocks Rally (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the stock market experienced fluctuations as the Dow Jones index reacted to surprising jobless claims data. Later in the day, Netflix is set to announce its earnings. The S&P 500 maintained its recent gains while AMD saw a breakout. Additionally, data center stocks showed a rally. This information is being covered live by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: $127.5M committed by Tether for Drift Protocol recovery post $280M hack; $150M recovery program led by Tether, switching to USDT.
data.description: Tether is spearheading a $150 million recovery initiative for Drift Protocol after a hack in April linked to North Korea. The platform is making a transition from USDC to USDT for settlements as part of the program.

data.title: Microsoft Stock Up After Analysts Reset Expectations
data.description: The stock of Microsoft is experiencing an upward trend as Wall Street analysts modify their projections for the cloud computing and productivity software company. Following this adjustment, the stock of Microsoft has increased in value.

data.title: Consumers Battle Subscription Fatigue. What It Means For Netflix, Adobe.
data.description: Consumers are showing signs of subscription fatigue as the market is flooded with new AI services, posing a challenge for industry giants like Netflix and Adobe. The strain on consumers is evident as they grapple with managing multiple subscriptions. This trend could have significant implications for companies relying on subscription-based models to drive revenue. Subscription fatigue indicates a potential saturation point, whereby consumers may hit a limit in terms of their willingness to subscribe to additional services. This shift in consumer behavior could impact the growth and sustainability of businesses operating in the subscription economy.

data.title: Abbott Laboratories Slammed On Its Post-Exact Sciences Guidance
data.description: Shares of Abbott faced a decline on Thursday due to disappointing guidance for the year and second quarter after acquiring Exact Sciences. Abbott Laboratories saw a drop in stock prices following this development.

data.title: ASML Beats Q1 Expectations, Sets Sights On 2027 Growth Despite Q2 Dip
data.description: Technology company ASML Holding NV (NASDAQ: ASML) outperformed in the first quarter, with revenue reaching €8.8 billion and earnings per share hitting €7.15, exceeding estimates of €8.6 billion and €6.57 per share. Despite a disappointing Q2 forecast, the company raised its 2026 guidance with an optimistic outlook for 2027, citing strong growth potential driven by higher-than-anticipated demand for Extreme Ultraviolet Lithography (EUV) technology. RBC Capital Markets analyst Srini Pajjuri, who has maintained an Outperform rating, increased the price target from $1,625 to $1,700. EUV revenue saw a 14% uptick sequentially, reaching €4.1 billion, with ASML shipping 16 tools. Pajjuri noted that the memory sector performed exceptionally well in the quarter, whereas Advanced Logic faced a decline likely due to timing issues and market conditions in China. For more details, refer to the full report on Benzinga.com.
